SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 1:
State all facts supporting YOUR decision to terminate Plaintiff's employment.

RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 1:


SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 2:
Identify ALL DOCUMENTS relating to any performance reviews of Plaintiff.

RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 2:


SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 3:
State the names of ALL persons who participated in the decision to terminate Plaintiff.

RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 3:
